summary: Tested new features: CSV Import for Suppliers/Categories, Public KPI API with API Key authentication, API Keys management in Settings. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Created admin@example.com user (was missing from database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. CSV import for suppliers/categories works via /api/suppliers/import-csv, /api/categories/import-csv, and /api/import/auto endpoints. KPI API at /api/public/kpi/* requires API key (X-API-Key header or ?api_key= param). API keys managed via /api/api-keys (admin only). Settings page has API tab with key management and documentation.

csv_import_suppliers.GET /api/suppliers/csv-template: PASS - Returns CSV template with semicolon delimiter

kpi_api_public.GET /api/public/kpi/doc: PASS - Returns documentation with 5 endpoints (no auth required)
kpi_api_public.GET /api/public/kpi/summary: PASS - Returns KPI summary (requires API key)
kpi_api_public.GET /api/public/kpi/costs: PASS - Returns costs data with optional supplier/version filters

api_key_authentication.401_without_key: PASS - Returns 401 when no API key provided
api_key_authentication.403_invalid_key: PASS - Returns 403 for invalid API key
api_key_authentication.403_inactive_key: PASS - Returns 403 for deactivated API key

api_keys_management.POST /api/api-keys: PASS - Admin can create API key (pk_<hex> format)
api_keys_management.GET /api/api-keys: PASS - Admin can list API keys
api_keys_management.PUT /api/api-keys/{id}/toggle: PASS - Admin can toggle active status
api_keys_management.DELETE /api/api-keys/{id}: PASS - Admin can delete API key
api_keys_management.operator_forbidden: PASS - Operator gets 403 on all API key endpoints

settings_api_tab.tab_visible: PASS - API tab visible in Settings
settings_api_tab.key_management_section: PASS - Cles API section with create form
settings_api_tab.documentation_section: PASS - Documentation API KPI with 5 endpoints
settings_api_tab.create_key_ui: PASS - Can create key via UI
settings_api_tab.key_display: PASS - Keys shown with masked format (pk_xxx•••)
settings_api_tab.copy_button: PASS - Copy to clipboard button works

import_center_dropdown.all_options: PASS - Matieres premieres, Recettes simples, Arbre de fabrication (BOM), Fournisseurs, Categories
